programme.desc: Continuing with Danielle & Brandon, who are involved in a custody battle. Accusations involving the Sheriff over a sports drink & CPS sent to a wedding rehearsal dinner--Dr. Phil tells the parents how to create a peaceful environment for their child.Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil had asked Ted Williams the hard questions about sobriety & avoiding the pitfalls of sudden success. After an emotional family reunion for Ted & several family members abandoned by him more than 20 years ago. Ted is next confronted with rehab.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Libby & Brian are at war over custody of their two young children. Get a behind-the-scenes look at what made Dr. Phil consider canceling the show & learn why he refused to allow these exes on his stage! Don't miss the backstage drama on today's Dr. Phil!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Affairs, fights, lies & dark secrets have divided family & friends. Brandon, a handsome, charming firefighter, has an ugly secret. One year into his marriage to Amy, he was caught cheating with their teenage nanny. Yet Brandon filed for divorce? Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez's fiancée, Shayanna Jenkins-Hernandez, speaks on the football star's prison suicide. She reveals their last phone call, what she thinks about his suicide note, & sheds light on the former New England Patriots' mindset. Pt. 1

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: In order to buy Mrs. Drysdale a special Christmas present, the Clampetts take seasonal jobs in a department store.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny discovers Martians next door at the Drysdale mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny decides to take her share of the Clampett millions and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Granny decide to donate the burden of their millions to some college students and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Crowfoot Indians come to Beverly Hills to discuss a boundary dispute at the Clampett oil field, Granny prepares for war.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After reading the Society page, Granny decides the best way to get Elly a husband is to throw her a coming out party, complete with possum burgers and gopher gravy. Mrs. Drysdale, hoping to forever humiliate them, is all too happy to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Milburn 'Drysdale's precocious 11-year-old nephew swindles the hillbillies of all the valuable art objects in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett has inherited a castle in the English countryside. Jethro insists that everyone, except Granny, wear the royal raiment's of Elizabeth (the First, of course).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro believes his moment for Hollywood stardom has arrived. Casting for Bachelor Sheriff Knows Best is occurring, and Jethro mistakenly thinks he has been chosen.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny competes against Mrs. Drysdale as artists and tells Jed about her uncle, the barn painter. Jed and Jethro go to an upscale gallery to buy a painting, but are mistaken for gardeners. Bessie the chimp dabbles with a paintbrush.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Ellie seems to be no longer interested in Dash Riprock Granny decides it's time to do a little matchmaking. She thinks the handsome actor would be perfect for Miss Jane.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the Clampetts into hiring a housekeeper. Unfortunately, the housekeeper that is hired is uninterested in doing housework.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's old friend, the widow Adaline Ashley, comes to Beverly Hills, and Granny sets to playing matchmaker for her and Jed. Mrs. Drysdale and her snooty friends are misled to believe Adaline is a socialite jet-setter.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to turn his favorite thing, eating, into a job by getting the family involved in buying a diner. The family's choice of offerings lead to a lack of customers, so Mr. Drysdale tries to fix things.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro, worried that his diner the Hungry Gizzard has no customers, has a wonderful idea. He busts in on Mr. Drysdale trying to impress the wealthy Vanderpools, announcing the restaurant is going topless. Confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to leave sunny California because she misses winter, sending Mr. Drysdale into a panic. The banker enlists Miss Jane in an elaborate scheme to convince the Clampetts that a blizzard has occurred.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E020) Baseball fever strikes when Brandon is asked to coach a little league team after his dad gets injured.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E021) The drama and the stakes rise as the West Beverly High crew gets ready for their Spring Dance.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E001) Summer is here, and Brandon breaks the news to Nat that he is quitting his job at The Peach Pit.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E002) Brandon sets his eyes on an older Beach Club worker, whose mysterious secrets make her even more appealing to him.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E003) Dylan, injured in a surfing incident, stays with the Walshes during his recovery - until Jim Walsh kicks him out for kissing Brenda!

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E004) After an illegal late-night poker game, Brandon and Dylan clash over a break-in at the beach club.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E005) Kelly is mortified when her mother starts dating David's father and plots to break up the new couple.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E007) The gang heads up to Yosemite on what turns out to be a totally doomed camping trip.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E009) An effort to create a neighborhood security patrol goes horribly awry resulting in race hate and violence.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E010) When Dylan's long-absent mother moves back into his life - not to mention into his home - things come to a head, forcing Dylan to confront his issues not only with his mother, but with himself as well.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E011) Brandon and Brenda's paraplegic cousin Bobby is visiting Beverly Hills - and Kelly finds him extremely interesting!

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E012) Andrea wins a high-school journalism contest, but her victory is marred by a school district investigation.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E013) The gang goes to a Halloween party, but things take a turn for the worst when Kelly's seductive costume catches the eye of a college student whose intentions are less than honorable.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S02E015) Emily invites everyone to a secret party at an underground club - where she does something that could end her relationship with Brandon forever.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las regals de la mafia
programme.desc: Decididos a hacer justicia por el ataque a Gormley, Danny y Frank buscan la ayuda del detective Anthony Abetemarco, quien tiene vínculos con el barrio donde ocurrió el ataque.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Buen policía, mal policía
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una anciana por una bala perdida. Mientras, Frank es ridiculizado por disciplinar a un policía irrespetuoso y Erin ayuda a su detective Anthony.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Morgan es secuestrado, la UAC se apresura a buscarlo y salvarle la vida.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Wichita en busca de un sospechoso que secuestra niños mientras sus padres duermen. Además, Morgan está intentando averiguar quién fue el responsable del ataque.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un sujeto ataca a la UAC, el equipo entra en acción para averiguar quién es el responsable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la ex miembro del equipo de la UAC y actual agente de la Interpol, Emily Prentiss localiza a un asesino en serie internacional, pide la ayuda de sus amigos de la UAC.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo son llamados cuando un hombre recientemente fallecido es encontrado encerrado en una tumba de la época de la Guerra Civil. El cadáver es el de un sargento desaparecido que, según Ducky, fue enterrado vivo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un contramaestre es brutalmente tiroteado en la autopista, Gibbs y el equipo descubren que el agente llevaba una doble vida.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan el asesinato de la esposa de un marine que parece haber sido difundido por Internet.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan cuando un niño de 6 años informa al NCIS de que su padre ha sido secuestrado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Buen policía, mal policía
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una anciana por una bala perdida. Mientras, Frank es ridiculizado por disciplinar a un policía irrespetuoso y Erin ayuda a su detective Anthony.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Por la comunidad
programme.desc: Erin y Anthony intentan evitar la deportación de la activista comunitaria Coryna Garza (Judy Reyes), quien no es ciudadana, y Frank debe decidir si el NYPD participará en la redada de alto perfil de los Marshals de EE. UU. contra una pandilla local.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El delator
programme.desc: Mientras Frank se enfrenta a un denunciante de la policía de Nueva York que afirma tener pruebas de abuso de poder en la organización, Danny y Báez investigan el caso de una mujer que fue atropellada por un coche en circunstancias sospechosas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Culpable por asociación
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave en el caso de Danny es asesinado justo antes de testificar, Erin enfurece a Danny al pedirle ayuda a Anthony (Steve Schrippa) para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man pulls out all the stops to elude the police, a civilian steps in when she spots a violent crime in progress, and a suspected shoplifter is confronted by officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit switches gears when the driver flees on foot, an altercation causes tension between neighbors, and a driver is irate when officers search his passenger.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man attempts to hide at his grandmother's house, police arrest a suspect driving a stolen vehicle, and officers call animal control for an injured dog.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a devastating car wreck after a high-speed chase, officers apprehend and question a robbery suspect, and a wanted man tries to flee from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A parolee leads deputies on a high-speed chase, police respond to a domestic disturbance call, and an officer helps frustrated citizens settle their differences.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A detective is injured after chasing a man driving a stolen car, a bar fight ends with a couple in handcuffs, and an officer finds a variety of items during a vehicle search.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation, and officers question a colorful trio of suspects.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called when a mother's job hunt takes a turn for the worse, and deputies confront a nervous man with a lot of bad habits.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young man receives a wake-up call when police catch him breaking the law, and officers play peacemakers after a board game sparks a family feud.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A defiant motorist is shocked when his mother sides with the law, and deputies discover a man wearing a bizarre costume during a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an armed suspect, the cops are called when a man damages his neighbor's window, and deputies investigate a parking garage known for illegal activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam realizes his baseball days are history when no one bids on his jersey.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane doesn't trust anyone when she's certain revenge is coming her way.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane convinces Sam to go to Frasier with fake depression symptoms so that Frasier can analyze him and get his confidence back as a psychiatrist. But Frasier comes back with a diagnosis that Sam's depressed because he's still in love with Diane.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff invites Diane and Carla to the annual ball and both unexpectedly accept.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam flips when Frasier wants to marry the first girl he dates after Lilith.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm gets a tip at work that could guarantee his promotion over the competition.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam suffers a hernia while trying to prove that he's not getting too old.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla turns to Sam as a partner to go up against Nick and Loretta in a dance competition.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Diane reveal their true feelings for each other while on the verge of death.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier plans a pick-me-up party for Diane, but she thinks it was Sam's idea.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody feels replaceable when an entertaining bartender overshadows him.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam expresses interest in politics when he falls for a woman running for city council.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Daphne fake two wedding ceremonies after eloping to Reno.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A very bad-tempered Frasier takes out his frustration through an act of civil disobedience, refusing to pay a small parking fee and blocking the exit lane of the garage.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin runs for condo board president and Frasier does all the work.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz feels old when her twenty-something cousin comes to town.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier plots revenge when Bulldog plays a Halloween prank on him.

programme.title: 3 hombres en mi vida
programme.desc: Carmen es una hermosa mujer que vive junto a su esposo Leonardo, un hombre desempleado y alcohólico. Tras un accidente, Carmen conoce a Fernando, un chofer, y al Dr. Carlos Junco, quienes intentarán conquistar su amor.

programme.title: El Potro Salvaje
programme.desc: Gastón halla en el campo el cadáver de Gerardo, dueño del potro blanco Rayo de Plata, e impide que el animal sea asesinado por El Manco.

programme.title: Ladronzuela
programme.desc: Una ladrona huerfana vive en la calle con tres niños que cantan en los camiones y termina en la cárcel por defenderlos.

programme.title: Pancho López
programme.desc: Un hombre es enviado a vender el ganado de un tío, pierde todo el dinero en el juego e inventa que fue asaltado.

programme.title: Pies de Gato
programme.desc: Luis Aguilar encabeza el elenco en esta historia de una banda de bandidos alegres cuyas hazañas son más divertidas que despreciables. Continuación de "Los bandidos de Río Frío" (1954).

programme.title: Los Galleros de Jalisco
programme.desc: Miguel Carrasco se devuelve a su ciudad natal y mata a Juan Huitron, después de que éste lo acusara de homicida. Miguel rechaza huir a pesar de que los hermanos del difunto buscan revancha.

programme.title: La cabeza de Pancho Villa
programme.desc: En sus últimos resoplos de vida, un hombre entrega una caja a sus amigos, pidiéndoles protegerla con su propia vida. Un grupo de forajidos anda tras la caja, lo que desatará una pugna sanguinaria.

programme.title: El revólver sangriento
programme.desc: Cuando uno nace con el alma de un pistolero, todo lo que uno piensa es matar. Su fiel compañero para esto es un Revolver, pero este es el caso de un REVOLVER SANGRIENTO que no tiene miedo, incluso mientras realiza sus deseos más mortales.

programme.title: Puedes contar conmigo
programme.desc: Sammy y Terry tienen un vínculo inquebrantable desde que quedaron huérfanos años atrás. Después de llevar una vida despreocupada, el caprichoso hermano vuelve a la vida de Sammy y su hijo Rudy.

programme.title: Música del corazón
programme.desc: Nominada para dos premios Óscar, Angela Bassett, Meryl Streep, Cloris Leachman y Gloria Estefan protagonizan esta alentadora historia verdadera de cómo el talento musical de una mujer afecta a las personas más inesperadas.

programme.title: Frontera hostil
programme.desc: Luego de ser deportada, Claudia debe elegir entre reconciliarse con su padre, de quien está distanciada, o juntarse con un peligroso contrabandista para poder volver a Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Fanático
programme.desc: La obsesión de un hombre con su actor favorito se convierte en locura al no poder conocerlo, borrando la línea entre admiración y delirio en este inquietante retrato de la fama y la obsesión.

programme.title: Escritores de la libertad
programme.desc: Hilary Swank protagoniza esta emocionante historia sobre chicos de barrio, que han crecido entre disparos y actitudes muy difíciles, y la maestra que les da lo que más necesitan: una voz propia.

programme.title: Lo que perdimos en el camino
programme.desc: Una viuda reciente invita al afligido mejor amigo de su marido a vivir con ella y a sus dos hijos. A medida que esto comienza a cambiar su vida, también ayuda a la familia a salir adelante y afrontar su pérdida.

programme.title: Destrucción
programme.desc: Una detective de policía reconecta con gente relacionada con una misión encubierta de hace años para encontrar paz.

programme.title: Prueba de amor
programme.desc: Desde que se conocen en medio del caos de la universidad en Nueva York, Al (Freddie Prinze Jr.) e Imogen (Julia Stiles) comienzan una aventura romántica en la que el amor verdadero a veces compite con la tentación de alejarse del compromiso.

programme.title: El príncipe y yo
programme.desc: Una fantástica historia de amor sobre una estudiante de medicina que se enamora de un príncipe danés que se negó a seguir las tradiciones de sus padres y vino a EE.UU. a rebelarse.

programme.title: Pequeñas grandes amigas
programme.desc: Molly es una princesa fiestera cuyo dinero acaba de agotarse. Ray es una niña quisquillosa cuya niñera acaba de salir huyendo. Cuando Molly es contratada para cuidar de Ray, se forma la combinación perfecta para que ambas chicas cambien sus vidas.

programme.title: Prueba de amor
programme.desc: Desde que se conocen en medio del caos de la universidad en Nueva York, Al (Freddie Prinze Jr.) e Imogen (Julia Stiles) comienzan una aventura romántica en la que el amor verdadero a veces compite con la tentación de alejarse del compromiso.

programme.title: El príncipe y yo
programme.desc: Una fantástica historia de amor sobre una estudiante de medicina que se enamora de un príncipe danés que se negó a seguir las tradiciones de sus padres y vino a EE.UU. a rebelarse.

programme.title: Fama
programme.desc: Fama es la inspiradora historia de un grupo de bailarines, cantantes, músicos y actores de la Escuela Secundaria de Artes Escénicas de la Ciudad de Nueva York, y su enérgico impulso por hacer realidad sus sueños de estrellato.

programme.title: Pequeñas grandes amigas
programme.desc: Molly es una princesa fiestera cuyo dinero acaba de agotarse. Ray es una niña quisquillosa cuya niñera acaba de salir huyendo. Cuando Molly es contratada para cuidar de Ray, se forma la combinación perfecta para que ambas chicas cambien sus vidas.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: ternacional Donnie Yen repite su papel icónico como el gran maestro de kung fu, Ip Man.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: Donnie Yen regresa a la exitosa serie de artes marciales de Ip Man. Cuando un desarrollador de bienes raíces corrupto (Mike Tyson) y su pandilla brutal intentan tomar control de la ciudad, Master Ip decide luchar contra ellos.

programme.title: Desastre aéreo
programme.desc: El Boeing Next Generation 797 es la nueva nave estándar en tecnología de lujo para traslado de pasajeros. Pero su viaje inaugural se torna turbulento cuando una banda violenta toma el control del avión.

programme.title: Perdido en la fama
programme.desc: Un rockero semi retirado y caprichoso (Antonio Banderas) debe espabilarse para rescatar a su esposa, quien ha sido secuestrada mientras se encontraba de vacaciones en Chile.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: Bruce Willis, Sigourney Weaver and Henry Cavill star in this pulse-pounding thriller about a man trying to save his kidnapped family.

programme.title: Resultado final
programme.desc: Después de que terroristas mortales secuestran a su sobrina en un partido de fútbol, un ex soldado con habilidades de combate letales (Dave Bautista) libra una guerra de un solo hombre para salvarla y evitar la destrucción masiva.

programme.title: El ritmo de la venganza
programme.desc: Blake Lively y Jude Law protagonizan esta película de suspenso y acción de los productores de James Bond. Tras descubrir que la muerte de su familia no fue un accidente, Stephanie (Lively) pasa de víctima a asesina, para vengarse de los responsables.

programme.title: Contacto sangriento 2
programme.desc: EL campeón de kickboxing Eric Sloane es paralizado en el ring por el malvado Tong Po. El hermano menor de Eric, Kurt, busca venganza. Kurt aprende Muay-Thai del gurú de la pelea Xian Chow.

programme.title: Perfectos desconocidos
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de mejores amigos se reúne durante un eclipse lunar para compartir una cena íntima en la elegante casa de Eva y Antonio, sospechan que se trata de otra noche cualquiera hasta que la anfitriona les propone un juego.

programme.title: Un amor
programme.desc: Los amigos de la infancia Bruno y Lalo son inseparables. Hasta que una joven hermosa y de espíritu libre llamada Lisa entra en sus vidas, volviéndolos locos y encendiendo un apasionado pero desgarrador triángulo amoroso.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre
programme.desc: La nueva era choca con la vieja en esta hilarante y cálida comedia familiar sobre un anciano gruñón de 85 años que se muda con su hijo y sus excéntricos compañeros de casa.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Cementerio de mascotas
programme.desc: Para la mayoría de las familias, una mudanza es un nuevo comienzo. Pero para los Creeds será el inicio del fin. Se han mudado al lado del lugar que los niños construyen con sus sueños rotos, el Cementerio de mascotas.

programme.title: La niña que se escapó
programme.desc: Una mujer que se escapó de un asesino en serie cuando era niña debe enfrentar su pasado cuando él reaparece veinte años después, y esta vez, viene por ella.

programme.title: Maniac Cop III: Código de silencio
programme.desc: El policía zombi, el oficial Matt Cordell (Robert Z'Dar, Tango & Cash), en su tercera vuelta desde más allá de la tumba, busca una novia: alguien amable, tierna y no muerta.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis protagoniza esta adaptación de la clásica historia de terror de Stephen King. Carrie es una chica tímida con poderes telequinéticos y cuando sus torturadores la someten a un acto de humillación, todos aprenderán una lección mortal.

programme.title: El demonio
programme.desc: En una carretera desolada, dos adolescentes que regresan a casa son embestidos por un maníaco en un camión destartalado y se convierten en el blanco de un mal más despiadado de lo que podrían haber imaginado.

programme.title: El demonio 2
programme.desc: Una antigua bestia carnívora aterroriza a un grupo universitario de jugadores de baloncesto, porristas y entrenadores que quedan atrapados en una remota autopista tras averiarse su autobús.

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer
programme.desc: En este clásico de Tarantino, los bandidos hermanos Gecko ¡cometen una ola de crímenes! Secuestran a un padre y sus dos hijos, y se esconden en un bar mexicano. Pero se enfrentarán a los clientes del bar y se unirán a sus rehenes para sobrevivir.

programme.title: Un fantasma fastidioso
programme.desc: Ghost Town es una comedia romántica enérgica. Es la historia de Bertram Pincus, un dentista malhumorado de Manhattan que desarrolla la habilidad poco grata de ver gente muerta.

programme.title: Beavis y Butt-head, la película
programme.desc: Cuando se roban su TV, Beavis y Butt-head emprenden camino en una hilarante película debut que les muestra a millones de fanáticos lo que ya saben: ¡Beavis y Butt-head son le mejor!

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: Los tres amigos
programme.desc: Las locuras de tres actores hollywoodenses (Steve Martin, Chevy Chase y Martin Short) que enfrentan a un grupo de bandidos mexicanos. ¿Qué podría salir mal?

programme.title: Un Ratoncito Duro De Cazar
programme.desc: Los dos hermanos sin suerte Lars y Ernie Smuntz no aprecian la vieja mansión en ruinas que heredaron, hasta que descubren que la propiedad vale millones.

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: Los tres amigos
programme.desc: Las locuras de tres actores hollywoodenses (Steve Martin, Chevy Chase y Martin Short) que enfrentan a un grupo de bandidos mexicanos. ¿Qué podría salir mal?

programme.title: Perdidos en Nueva York
programme.desc: La pasión del matrimonio entre Henry y Nancy Clark desapareció hace mucho tiempo. Pero ahora su hijo menor ha abandonado el nido y los Clarks tienen la oportunidad de trasladarse a Nueva York.

programme.title: The Kentuckian
programme.desc: Eli Wakefield (Burt Lancaster) and his son are Kentucky adventurers longing for life on the Texas frontier. They learn, however, that their greatest challenge lies not in the uncharted wilderness, but in the people they meet along the way.

programme.title: The Way West
programme.desc: Icons Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum and Richard Widmark star in this sumptuous, epic tale of the brave men and women in the U.S. who left the comfort and safety of life in the East for the promise of free land a better life in the untamed West.

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: Dakota
programme.desc: In 1871 Dakota, two crooked businessmen oppose the local wheat farmers and the railroad development, in order to control the town of Fargo.

programme.title: In Old California
programme.desc: The Duke plays a young, ambitious pharmacist who moves into a brawling frontier town but locks horns with a local crime lord, bent on keeping the town for himself.

programme.title: Rio Grande
programme.desc: Lt. Col. Yorke leads his cavalry troops to the Rio Grande to fight a warring tribe. Yorke’s toughest battle lies ahead when his unorthodox plan to outwit the elusive Apaches leads to possible court-martial.

programme.title: Irma La Douce
programme.desc: Set in Paris' famous Red Light district, a rookie policeman (Jack Lemmon) plots to keep a beautiful prostitute (Shirley MacLaine) all to himself in this hit comedy from director Billy Wilder.

programme.title: Kiss Me, Stupid
programme.desc: In this comic gem from the legendary Billy Wilder and his long-time writing partner I.A.L. Diamond, Dean Martin is a famous singer targeted by two would-be songwriters who encourage a waitress (Kim Novak) to coerce Dino into a song-buying mood.

programme.title: Moby Dick (1956)
programme.desc: This stellar retelling of Melville's classic is unsurpassed in entertainment, imagination and high adventure. Consumed by an insane rage, Captain Ahab (Gregory Peck) has but one purpose in life - revenge on the great white whale who disfigured him.

programme.title: Paths Of Glory
programme.desc: This powerful, fact-based absurdity-of-war film stars Kirk Douglas as a commanding officer who defends three scapegoats on trial for a failed offensive that occurred within the French Army in 1916.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars in one of his funniest roles as a boozy beachcomber sitting out WWII in peace - until the Allies recruit him to be a lookout on the South Pacific isle.

programme.title: Donovan's Reef
programme.desc: Acclaimed director John Ford and screen legend John Wayne team up for what would be their final collaboration in this boisterous, rowdy South Seas escapade.

programme.title: The Quiet Man
programme.desc: An American ex-boxer returns to Ireland to win the hand of a spirited young woman. He is confronted by local customs and the woman's belligerent brother. Set in the verdant Irish countryside, this film has beautiful scenery and local charm.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar become roommates in the hospital in Hospital Mates.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix's pet parrot takes a turn for the worse, and Oscar, who never liked the bird, offers to handle the burial arrangements.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Over Oscar's objections, Felix recounts to their dates how they met while serving on a jury.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix volunteers on behalf of Oscar and himself to take care of a small boy. But on his first visit, the boy is indifferent to the cultural program Felix has planned and fascinated by sloppy Oscar and his hobbies and habits.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix takes refuge with friends Murray and Mimi when Oscar, in the throes of a hangover, asks him to leave in The Breakup. He is convinced that all he has to do is wait until Oscar feels better, but he is wrong.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix suspects Oscar when $50 is missing from the poker bank in The Blackout. Oscar tries to borrow money to get into the weekly poker game and learns his credit is even lower than his bankroll.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix is away on a photo assignment and Oscar is suspected of foul play.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate's intentions are mistaken when she tries to help Floyd Smoot regain his confience after being slighted by the woman he loves.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate tries to teach Betty Jo how to make Hot Rhubarb after setting her up on a double date.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Bank robbers stay the night at Shady Rest hoping to intercept a bank shipment on the Cannonball.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe is pelted with eggs after his team, the Hooterville Hornets lose a game.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate hires Herby to work as an Assistant Manager at the hotel, causing Uncle Joe to fear for his position.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe's latest scheme involves turning the Shady Rest into a Honeymooners getaway.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction

programme.desc: When Herby gets drafted, Kate tries to cheer him up by saying he could become an astronaut.

programme.desc: Carter bets Sgt. Hacker that he can't teach Gomer to cook a meal.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer dates a girl with similar interests, then discovers that she considers them engaged after the first date.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter gives his girlfriend a puppy only to find himself competing with it for her affections.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer and Carter are captured by smugglers.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sgt. Carter learns Bunny was seen with another man.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer can predict the weather better than the weather bureau.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: A songstress applauds Gomer's song with a kiss.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer unwittingly signs up a fugitive bank robber as a new recruit.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Arnold, the Ziffels' television-loving pig, has taken on a paper route to save enough money for a new color set. But when bank robbers show up and threaten his dreams, and Lisa and Oliver are held captive in their own home, Arnold has to fight back.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The farmers of Hooterville are headed to France! Or at least they are if they can get organized. As part of an agricultural exchange program, the farmers are offered a chance to join a chartered government flight to Europe.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Harriet DeLong has cared for her nephew Eric ever since her sister Natalie’s murder. Suddenly, Harriet must fight for custody of the boy, as his dead father's widow, Emily Trundel, has come to town with the money and resources to take Eric away.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Warren Moseley, a highly respected man in Sparta, has two grown sons who are always at odds: Louis is dedicated to the family business, while Brian has wasted his years away gambling and partying. Will Brian's gambling debts destroy the family?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Roy Paxton served time for robbery and is released from a Texas prison with a mission: finding the stolen money. Unfortunately, his ex-wife found it first and ran away with her son to Sparta. Will he find the money before the Sparta police find him?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Sheriff McComb asks Chief Gillespie and Virgil Tibbs to help capture an escaped inmate, Ramon Salazar, but they’re both conflicted when they learn that Salazar is a victim of violent political injustice in his native country of war-torn El Salvador.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: After the escape and death of refugee Ramon Salazar, Gillespie, Tibbs and Father DeMarco are all on trial for harboring a fugitive and obstructing justice. Meanwhile, mobster Alvin Epp wants Gillespie fired and will do anything to see that happen.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: The Crew,' a drug dealing gang from nearby Jackson bring violence and tragedy with them when they move into Sparta and start eliminating the competition. Harriet DeLong’s son Eugene witnesses the massacre of his childhood friend and a local dealer.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Sparta is sent reeling from a wave of drug overdose cases as Gillespie and Tibbs close in on 'The Crew,' a murderous gang of crack dealers. Eugene bravely identifies the gang members that murdered his close friend, but now his own life is in danger.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Old family conflicts resurface when Officer Luann Corbin's brother Tyler is released from prison and moves back home, driving a wedge between Luann, who thinks it’s a bad idea and that Tyler will never change, and her mother, who welcomes him.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Obsessed with his ex-girlfriend, a disturbed teenager kills her new boyfriend and pins the murder on her stepfather. Althea sees the teen’s hostility at school and realizes how dangerous he is. Can he be stopped from making one more fatal mistake?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Althea Tibbs struggles with depression after witnessing the shocking suicide of a student, and the dead teen’s ex-girlfriend starts dating a guy with a criminal record, who she’s desperate to flee Sparta with to escape from her abusive stepfather.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Gillespie is reunited with his daughter Lana, when she comes to Sparta to settle her inheritance, but she’s been followed by her mother’s ex-boyfriend, who claims that it all belongs to him, and he’s willing to take drastic measures to collect.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Rose Murphy is sexually assaulted at work by her boss and, fending off another attack, she kills him. When she confesses the shooting to her husband, he makes it look like a failed robbery. A pair of thieves are arrested, but the clues don’t add up.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Morphine tablets have been disappearing from Newton General Hospital, and Tibbs' investigation into the suspicious deaths of terminally ill patients at that facility leads him to believe his Aunt Ruda's own physician, Dr. Lambert, might be involved.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Bubba learns the disappointing truth that Eddie Larran, the country singer he idolizes, might have stolen his biggest hit, leaving his former writing partner, Ace McCabe, with none of the wealth derived from the song. Robert Goulet guest stars.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, en Grand Junction, Colorado suceden una serie de bombardeos que matan a dos personas y lastiman a uno más. La policía corre para poder encontrar al culpable antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Dawn Bruce, de 22 años, es brutalmente asesinada en su apartamento de Virginia. Los investigadores notan una mancha de sangre en la funda de una almohada que parece haber sido hecha por uno de los dedos del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre, lo que hablaba del horror del crimen: el asesinato de dos niños pequeños y el apuñalamiento de su madre.

programme.desc: En 1994, Rhoda Nathan fue encontrada asesinada en una habitación de un hotel en Cincinnati.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fiebre del oro
programme.desc: El despacho de emergencia recibió una llamada de un hombre que dijo que su novia se disparó y se suicidó. La autopsia reveló que la herida de bala no fue autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe attempts to ward off her feelings for an unlikely candidate by leaning into a romance a familiar face.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley has set her sights on becoming Degrassi's School President. Toby, spurred on by their awkward new situation as step-siblings, is frustrated by her unchallenged status and convinces JT to run against her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri's sure that no guy will ever want her and she wants to skip the school dance. Spinner seems interested in her though, and Ashley and Paige convince her to let them make her over.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby can't stand the idea of Parents Night - the last time his divorced parents were in the same room they had a huge, embarrassing fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy's eight-month anniversary is coming up - and so is the question of whether or not to have sex. Paige is playing Juliet opposite Jimmy's English-class Romeo and she's planting doubts in Ashley's mind.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy desperately wants to make the basketball team. But, surprisingly, it looks like Sean is surpassing him as a possible star player.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a long absence overseas, Ashley's dad is back in town. She's enjoying his company and attention, but something tells her there's a piece of his life that's being kept from her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lacking real family time at home, Jimmy has been spending more and more time at Ashley's house. He and Toby are like brothers and Kate's begun referring to him as her "third kid".

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool"

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Until recently most scientists thought they knew what killed off the dinosaurs. It was a 10 km-wide meteorite which smashed into Yucatan in Mexico.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the idea of human coexistence with dinosaurs. Had the species not disappeared from the face of earth ages ago, keeping them as pets could have been a possibility.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog juggles his job and family responsibilities at the same time. He leads the search for Robert, a low-level drug dealer. As he hunts down Robert, Dog gets on the phone to tell Beth not to spend too much money to furnish Leland's Honolulu apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Hunting down a fugitive known as "Bozo," Dog gets help from an unexpected source, Bozo's father-in-law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team get a big surprise after they track down Bosco, a fugitive who they believe is addicted to methamphetamines. They discover he's off drugs, settling into a normal life with a new girlfriend, and is very friendly.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has a full plate of fugitives in Kona, and the whole family heads to the Big Island to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog visits his mother's grave for inspiration before heading out to find Frankie, a violent fugitive hiding in the jungle. The spirit of Ma Chapman seems to help when Dog finds an unusual ally; Frankie's mother.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog lectures high school students about the dangers of drugs before going after Joseph, a dangerous fugitive who won't be easy to capture.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog takes the day off to try his hand at coaching, and assigns Tim and Leland to track down a dangerous fugitive on their own. Can the boys prove they can handle it?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is out to make two grabs on two islands in one day. Part of the team is goes to Kona to nab a woman who skipped her court date. Meanwhile, Dog and the others hunt Patrick, a fugitive who's fighting in an Extreme Boxing event on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has only a few days to catch a woman nicknamed Cats or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond. But it won't be easy - Cats is eight months pregnant, so Dog will have to lure her in rather than risk a violent grab.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in for a big surprise after he catches a fugitive named Jonaven in a sting operation.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Back in Denver, Blake continues his frantic search for Steven with the help of psychic Jason Dehner. Blake refuses to believe his son is dead, and Krystle is worried about his erratic behavior. Fallon mends fences with stepmother, Krystle.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: An obviously ill Jeff continues to function in a confused state. Sammy Jo announces she's headed for New York to make it big as a model and no longer wants to keep her son, Danny. Blake offers the girl $100,000 to be a mother to the child.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff's temper continues to grow more volatile. Adam attempts to implicate Jeff in the Cecil Colby/Logan Rhinewood scandal. After learning that Blake and Krystle intend to adopt Steven's son Danny, Alexis demands custody of her grandson.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Although Blake begs her to postpone taking action until Jeff's violent behavior can be explained. Fallon flies to Haiti to obtain a divorce; Mark shows up unexpectedly at her hotel. Alexis tells Adam she cannot allow Jeff to be poisoned.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is concerned the doctors will learn the truth behind Jeff's illness, but Adam tries to cover by ordering his office remodeled and the lethal paint compound removed. Mark and Fallon get closer in Haiti.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle suspects Alexis knows the reason for Jeff's illness; Blake tries to prevent Alexis' proposed merger; Jeff is released from the hospital and Kirby reveals her feelings for him.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Blake is departing for Singapore to identify his son, Alexis intercepts him at the airport to assure him she will not be stopped from merging their respective companies.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake persaudes Steven to return to Denver for his son's sake; the rest of the Carringtons are emotional, learning that Steven's alive and returning home; once home, Steven reunites with Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon hearing that Kirby has married Jeff, Joseph tells his daughter she has ruined her life. Blake suggests to Alexis they call a truce to their battle over Steven; Alexis offers Steven a share in Colbyco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As the Board of Directors gathers to vote on the Denver-Carrington/Colbyco merger, Alexis pointedly tells the group that a nay vote will be met with immediate dismissal. The approval of the motion sends Blake into a fury.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake confronts Alexis with evidence of fraudulent figures involved in the recent merger; Alexis learns Blake's lucrative oil extraction process does not extend to Colbyco. Newlyweds Jeff and Kirby have their first fight.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A scandalous newspaper headline implicates Congressman McVane with a young girl in Washington; he realizes Alexis orchestrated his downfall. Kirby finds she is pregnant.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: When Blake learns Steven's attorney Chris has moved in with his son, he vows to fight for custody of little Danny. Morgan Hess, Alexis' private investigator, asks his employer for a large sum of money to pay off a gambling debt.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle and Alexis, trapped in a burning cabin far off in the woods, find the door has been locked--from the outside. Mark, who has come to see Krystle in this remote setting, dramatically rescues the two women, who are rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Slovenia - Central
programme.desc: The capital city of Slovenia is the heart of the country and one of the most picturesque cities in the world. Just a 45-minute drive north lies one of the most beautiful places in the world, Lake Bled.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Slovenia - Western
programme.desc: Ashley explores the two most famous in Eastern Europe, the goes to explore the rich minerals of the salt fields, flies over the Adriatic, and sails along Slovenia’s coastline through Piran and Koper.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Croatia - Zagreb
programme.desc: The capital city of Zagreb is bustling and is home to one million inhabitants.U+00A0 In nearby Kostanjica is a chestnut season, and she’ll collect, roast, and enjoy them with the locals.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Croatia - Istria
programme.desc: Every grape, tree, shell, and animal brings rich rewards, but the hands that prepare them are even more prized.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Croatia - Split
programme.desc: Life moves at a different pace along this cultural center of Dalmatia.U+00A0 The most prized islands are off the coast of Split, and Ashley finds the oldest and last grappa distillery on the island of Hvar- using an ancient recipe.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Croatia - Kvarner
programme.desc: Overcoming a turbulent past, this is where tourism and the Croatian language were written. Full of islands, coastal areas, and mountaintops, this rich landscape was settled by the wealthy.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Croatia - Sibenik / Zadar
programme.desc: It’s time for donkey races, and some of the most prized National Parks in Croatia, which Ashley will explore by boat! Damatia’s northern coast is deeply rooted with a history built upon this ancient coastal town.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Croatia - Dubrovnik
programme.desc: Undoubtedly, this region’s architecture comprised of several periods is some of the finest in Europe. Yacht lover’s can’t resist, and Ashley finds the hidden secrets in the surrounding area.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Croatia - Slavonia
programme.desc: Continental Croatia’s abundance of land plays a key role in the country, and Ashley experiences this while off-roading through the plethora of vineyards and open space.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Latvia - Gauja National Park
programme.desc: One of three Baltic States, Latvia’s rich forest holds the magic of Gauja National Park where Ashley rafts, canoes, treks, rides, and bungees through the largest National Park in the country.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Latvia - Riga
programme.desc: Ashley falls in love with the charm of Latvia’s capital city, Riga. The Soviet times left an abandoned history in Karosta and Ashley experiences the times as a prisoner and escapes to the sea like many.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Although Portugal is a country with a relatively small territory, the difference in landscapes is quite notorious.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Water is a vital element for the survival of all living beings on Planet Earth. From the top of the mountains where the rivers begin to run, to their final destination, we will get to know the animals and landscapes that cross the heart of Wild Portugal.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: The richness of Portugal's coastal waters is amazing. Thousands of creatures live here, both in the water and on land. The Portuguese coast is the ultimate frontier before the Atlantic Ocean.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Maine resident Pearl Smith goes missing after an argument with her husband, Bill Bruns. When investigators find a blood trail that leads to the couple's basement, police are sure they'll find the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, San Diego police are baffled by a pair of hands found in a dumpster. Through further investigation, they determine that the hands are those of missing person Don Hardin.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, 22-year-old Dawn Bruce is brutally murdered in her Virginia apartment. Investigators notice a blood smear on a pillow case that appears to have been made by one of the killer's fingers.

programme.desc: Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the car that the famous singer Nora Anita loved and drove for nearly half a century. Zenigata and the police are after him, but they won't make a move for fear of damaging the priceless car. Where is Lupin headed in the treasured car?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While in Italy, Lupin gets a call from someone claiming to have kidnapped Fujiko. The kidnapper blackmails Lupin into stealing a marionette once owned by Gennai Hiraga and now being kept in a mansion in Tokyo.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Declarations of theft show up throughout the city, and they all bear the message "Tonight I'm going to get you, Lupin III," with a lipstick mark underneath. The one who's been distributing the notes is Rebecca.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Da Vinci announces that he is going to unveil his latest work in San Marino. Its title is "World Harmony." After the announcement, for some reason, people all around the Italian Peninsula fall unconscious... and Lupin and the gang are no exception.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca's personality is under Da Vinci's control. In an effort to save her, Lupin delves into her mind, where he struggles with all kinds of traps set by Da Vinci. He manages to find Rebecca's memories, but Da Vinci has overwritten all her memories.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin meets Rebecca to sign divorce papers, before they could finish they are attacked by zombies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca remembers the first time she meets Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #13: Alcatraz Connection
programme.desc: Master thief Lupin III, gunslinger Jigen and swordmaster Goemon are back for a new caper, this time aboard the casino-ship Machine Gun Kelly. Between the mafia, interpol, and a secret organization based under Alcatraz!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #14 Episode 0: The First Contact
programme.desc: The stickup that started it all! Lupin and Fujiko are both after an ancient artifact Jigen is supposed to protect, while Goemon happens to be searching for his clan's lost treasure nearby. Of course, Inspector Zenigata isn't far behind.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #16: Swallowtail Tatoo
programme.desc: A mysterious criminal captures Lupin and Fujiko with a very specific order: in order to save Fujiko's life, Lupin must infiltrate a high-security museum and steal the Bull's Eye jewel. One little problem: the jewel is cursed to kill anyone who steals it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin's new target is the digital currency gained from the transactions made on this site. Lupin sneaks into a massive high-security server facility, known as the "twin towers". Lupin greets the guard to the key, a young girl and skilled hacker "Ami".

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "Hunt down the greatest thief of our times, Lupin III!" The Marco Polo executives have set a trap in the form of the Lupin Game. This has people all over the world tracking down Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Shinpei Mayama, the Rat Clan, Union Mama... the all-stars of assassination, from all over the world, suddenly come after Lupin. They're players in a new game started by the executives of Marco Polo: Happy Deathday.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Fujiko smiles deviously as she points her gun at Lupin, when Zenigata arrives to save him and Ami. They get into the inspector's car which takes off, but it's soon attacked by soldiers who are trying to cash in the price on Lupin's head.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: La Venganza de los Ex: Caribe comienza con una fiesta en un barco en el Caribe. Hadad es el primer ex en llegar. Ortega se divide entre Camila y Mariana. Entre discusión y discusión, los participantes acaban buscando a un nuevo ex.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Ortega, JV y Mario reciben a Mari A en la playa. De vuelta a casa, JV intenta ligar con Leticia. Ortega acude a una cita con Mari F. En la primera suite principal, la recién llegada Mari A, elige a JV. Leticia, Haexa y Vaski salen a buscar a otro ex.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Let, Haexa y Vaski reciben a Apolo, el ex de Leticia. Vaski es quien toma el pelo a la novata. Ortega se debate entre Camila y Mariana y JV no puede decidirse entre Mari A y Leticia, lo que culmina en una gran bronca tras la Pool Party.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Lua, la ex de Gabriel, llega a la playa. Gab y Angietta queman a JV, pero a Lua no le importa y los dos se enrollan mucho en una cita. Camila y Ortega rompen. La tablet les convoca a un Luau donde llega Julio, el ex novio de Mari A.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Al ver llegar a su ex, Mari A se preocupa por Ortega. Mario y Apolo se pelean por Let. Ortega se derrumba ante la llegada de su ex. La tablet regala la suite a Camila. Let recoge a Gabriel y Ortega y Mariana se ponen al día bajo el edredón.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Bernardo, el ex de Mari F, llega a duras penas y la tableta los enfrenta para lavar sus trapos sucios. La casa se vuelve de nuevo contra Let. Hadad, Bernardo y Julio reciben a otra ex y ella tiene que elegir entre Julio y Hadad.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Abelha y Julio tienen una cita, Hadad es eliminado. Una pelea entre Ortega y Julienne sacude la casa. Ortega, Haeixa, Gab y Angietta se besan mucho en una aventura que acaba en desnudez. La tableta de regalos Deja la suite principal, ella elige a Julio.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Bruno, el ex de Vaski, llega y tiene una cita con Apolo. Julienne se pelea con Mari F por Ortega. Muchos besos en la fiesta fetichista y a Gab le regalan la primera suite triple master, con Lua y Leticia, la noche está llena de sexo, confusión y llanto.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Isa, el ex de Leticia, llega besando a Angietta. La noche trae grandes discusiones. Bernardo y Haeixa son elegidos para una cita. Más confusión entre las parejas y la noche termina con mucho sexo.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Julio, JV y Gab reciben a la ex de JV. Vascki, Camilla, Ortega, JV, Gab y Mari F disfrutan de una fiesta fuera de la casa pero no se imaginan que uno de ellos se quedará fuera. En Cabine dos Segredos, el público elige a JV como el payaso de la casa.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Haeixa, Julienne y Abelha dan la bienvenida a Bruno. Julienne y él disfrutan de una cita en plan romántico. Mary M da una calurosa bienvenida al novato Bruno y los dos terminan la noche besándose.

programme.desc: Megan wanted to find out if her boyfriend Devin was cheating. But even darker relationship secrets surfaced! Plus, you'll be shocked to find out why Laura and Steven need Steve's help again!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jamarkus says he fears that his twins are not his own; a teen and his mother insist that he is not the father of his ex-girlfriend's baby; Leroy says there is no way his daughter's mother's son is his.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: According to Dennis, ex-girlfriend Kendal refuses to let him go and keeps him around by lying about being pregnant. He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve's DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Valerie is fed up with her controlling boyfriend Chris. She says he treats her like a prisoner, but he suspects she's cheating! Then, Amanda is in a bad relationship with Joseph. He believes that Amanda cheated and denies fathering her kids!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jennifer spent years tracking down her biological mother and when she finally did, her mother's husband, Rodney, drove them apart after she turned him down. Refusing to lose her mother again, she turns to Steve for help!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Ashley's mother is here because she says she's witnessed first hand Ashley's boyfriend Scott's abusive ways. She says that Scott has completely isolated Ashley and her grandchild from the rest of her family.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Desiree and Kim have been dating Chango for 6 years! Next Mark's ex wants him back and even lied about a pregnancy. Today she will be confronted by Mark and his new girlfriend!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Cynthia suspects her husband Scott of cheating with her sister, while Ray admits to a similar affair

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Anita is ready to dump her husband for her ex-lover. Next Theresa is cheating on her fiancé with his brother! Later Kevin is here to ell his girlfriend's ex, Jermaine, to back off.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Even though Shawn and Gina have been dating for over two months, Shawn has no idea that Gina is really a man. Next, Imani comes clean about her gender to both of her boyfriends!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: John weighs almost 700 pounds and couldn't be happier. HIs girlfriend Kim goes so far as to make him choose between her and a 10-foot long sandwich! He chooses the sandwich.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mike's wife of 20 years, Beverly, left him 5 months ago and has been living with an "old flame!" Then Christine has been sleeping with her husband's friend! She says he drove her to it since he treats her badly.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Chloe and Dan will tie the knot soon, but she’s finally ready to tell him about her real job. Then Amanda’s mom begs her to quit her job.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tiffany has been cheating with so many people and she's brought them all here today. Next Jimmy has been having an affair with his girlfriend's best friend, Summer. Later Curtis finds out his girlfriend, Sharon, never quit her wild job.
